title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF BUKAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF RIZAL, PROVINCE OF LAGUNA.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3229 / 57 OG No. 7, 1194 (February 13, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2801, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF BUKAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF RIZAL, PROVINCE OF LAGUNA.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Alibungbungan in the Municipality of Rizal, Province of Laguna, is converted into a barrio of said municipality to be known as the barrio of Bukal.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
